conversation.text: Mommy? Sorry. Mommy? Sorry. Mommy? Sorry… unless?
unless what exactly? you lost or just looking for trouble?
unless you wanna teach me how to behave
behave? you don’t even look like you’d survive a lap around the corral
i’ll take the risk if it means getting a private rodeo
tight’s cute but i need a man who doesn’t fall off after five seconds
give me eight and i’ll buy the boots

opener: Mommy? Sorry. Mommy? Sorry. Mommy? Sorry… unless?
